title: crucifera lepidium
intro: Crucifera lepidium, also known as garden cress or Lepidium sativum, is an annual herb native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of crucifera lepidium include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting the immune system and potentially lowering blood pressure. The herbal preparations of garden cress include fresh leaves and seeds, which can be consumed raw or used to make teas, infusions, and extracts.
